scripts.build: cd packages/engine && bun run build && cd ../capability && bun run build && cd ../../apps/agent && bun run build && cd ../web && bun run build
scripts.build:agent: cd packages/engine && bun run build && cd ../capability && bun run build && cd ../../apps/agent && bun run build
scripts.test:capability: cd packages/engine && bun run build && cd ../.. && bun test packages/capability/tests
scripts.test:agent: bun run build:agent && bun test apps/agent/tests
scripts.typecheck: cd packages/engine && bun run typecheck && cd ../capability && bun run typecheck && cd ../../apps/agent && bun run typecheck && cd ../web && bun run check
scripts.check: bun run test && bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run smoke:agent
